title: fagraea iliasii
intro: Fagraea iliasii, also known as the Singapore orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagraea iliasii are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Fagraea iliasii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
